questions.question: A cistern can be filled by pipe A in 15 hours and pipe B in 20 hours. However, due to sediment deposition, after every 3 hours of operation, each pipe's efficiency reduces by 10% of its original rate. If both pipes start together, approximately how long will it take to fill the tank?
options:
11.45 hours
HACK WITH INFY
DXC
Hexaware

questions.question: 75, 65, 85, 55, 45, 85, 35, ... choose which pair of numbers comes next?
From the following options select the word which cannot be formed from the letters of the given word INSPIRATION

A family consists of six members P, Q, R, S, T, and U. There are two married couples. Q is a doctor and the father of T. U is the grandfather of R and is a contractor. S is the grandmother of T and is a housewife. There is one doctor, one contractor, one nurse, one housewife, and two students in the family. Which of the following is definitely a pair of married couples?
If A + B means A is the father of B, A - B means A is the mother of B, A × B means A is the brother of B, and A ÷ B means A is the sister of B, then what does P + Q - R × S ÷ T mean?
options: T is the daughter of Q
S is the son of P
T is the granddaughter of P

R is the nephew of T
DXC
HACK WITH INFY
questions.correctAnswer: T is the granddaughter of P

questions.question: Three pipes A, B, and C are connected to a tank. A and B can fill it in 30 and 40 hours respectively, while C can empty it in 60 hours. The pipes are operated in a cycle: A for 1 hour, then B for 1 hour, then C for 1 hour, and the cycle repeats. How long will it take to fill the empty tank?

A group of 8 workers can complete a task in 30 days. To speed up the process, the foreman decides that for as long as more than 40% of the work remains, 15 workers will be employed. As soon as the remaining work is 40% or less, the team will be reduced to 10 workers. How many total days will it take for the task to be completed under this new arrangement?

Statement:

I. Air quality index in the city has improved significantly over the past month.

II. The government has banned old diesel vehicles from entering the city.
options: Statement I is the cause and Statement II is its effect
Statement II is the cause and Statement I is its effect

Both statements are effects of independent causes
L&T Infotech
DXC
questions.correctAnswer: Statement II is the cause and Statement I is its effect

questions.question:
Two statements are given followed by three conclusions numbered I, II and III. Assuming the statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusion logically follow(s) from the statements.



Statements:

Some mobiles are instruments.

All instruments are heavy items.



Conclusions:

I. Some mobiles are heavy items.

II. No mobile is a heavy item.

III. Some heavy items are instruments.
options: Only conclusion III and either conclusion I or II follow
Only conclusions I and III follow
questions.correctAnswer: Only conclusions I and III follow
